title: Choas Create
description: A forge create modpack I created for my friends and I about being immersed into a world of chaos
body:
# DESCRIPTION
This modpack was created for me and my friends innitially and now it is open to the world. 

It is gernerally a modpack centered around the create mod and automation with plenty of mods to dashed in to add a lil chaos as you adventure into the world. Immersive mods to make the world feel more beautiful and plenty of dungeons for those friends who just want to be there.


## Server Settings
### In order to run a server these mods need to be disabled on the Server Side (NOT CLIENT SIDE)

- Ambient Sounds
- BetterF3
- Connectored C2ME
- Controlling
- Falling LEaves
- Freecam
- Item Borders
- Legendary Tooltips
- More Overlays Updated
- Sodium Extras
- Zume



## Liscnced mods below
Quark: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark)

Cosmetic Armor Reworked: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked)

Protection Pixel: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/protection-pixel](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/protection-pixel)

Euphoria Patches: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/euphoria-patches](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/euphoria-patches)

Create: Broken Bad: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-broken-bad](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-broken-bad)

Create: Destroy: [https://modrinth.com/mod/destroy](https://modrinth.com/mod/destroy)
